content.title: Wolfcreek Cluster
content.text:
Forge Your Pack.

10x Trio PvP
Crossplay Enabled
Custom Loot Drops
30x Breeding
Level 150 Wild Dinosaurs

content.title: Server Rules
content.text:
Please read the full rules in Discord before playing.

Respect other players and staff.
No cheating, exploiting or meshing.
Tribe limit: 3 players.
Report rule breaches through Discord tickets.

content.title: <TextStyle.White>White Drops</>
content.text: Artifacts, creature trophies and progression items.

content.title: <TextStyle.Green>Green Drops</>
content.text: Kibble, Sweet Vegetable Cake, Crossbows, Longneck Rifles, tranquiliser ammunition and taming supplies.

content.title: <TextStyle.Blue>Blue Drops</>
content.text: Chibis, medical consumables, metal tools, grappling hooks, armour, pistols and Pump-Action Shotguns.

content.title: <TextStyle.Violet>Purple Drops</>
content.text: Early-game, mid-game and platform saddle loot. Bonus drops may contain improved saddle blueprints.

content.title: <TextStyle.Yellow>Yellow Drops</>
content.text: Ghillie, Desert Cloth, Flak, Riot, Fur and SCUBA equipment, along with advanced firearms.

content.title: <TextStyle.Red>Red Drops</>
content.text: Advanced armour, firearms, tools and premium late-game saddle blueprints. Bonus drops may contain Cursed Gear.

content.title: <TextStyle.Orange>Cave Drops</>
content.text: High-quality armour, advanced weapons, tools and late-game saddle blueprints.

content.title: <TextStyle.Yellow>Desert Crates</>
content.text: Premium armour, firearms, tools, Cursed Gear and late-game saddle blueprints.

content.title: <TextStyle.Blue>Beaver Dams</>
content.text: Cementing Paste, Wood, Metal Ingots, Polymer, Electronics, Black Pearls, Crystal and other valuable resources.

content.title: <TextStyle.Red>Alpha Rewards</>
content.text: Advanced armour, firearms, tools and Element.

content.title: <TextStyle.Violet>Boss Rewards</>
content.text: Element, Gaia Potions, advanced equipment, Cursed Gear, late-game saddles and Tek rewards.

content.title: <TextStyle.Orange>Event Drops</>
content.text: Artifacts, trophies, Element, Gaia Potions, premium equipment, Cursed Gear and late-game saddle rewards.
